title: DEKTON 50MM X10M Black Cloth Duct Tape | Up to 600V Protection | Self-Fusing Adhesive PVC Tape | Water Resistant for Durability | Works in -0 to 8°C Temperatures | Strong, Reliable, and Long-Lasting
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack

Up to 600V Protection: This insulation tape is designed to handle up to 600V, making it ideal for electrical insulation tasks. It provides reliable protection for wiring and other electrical components, ensuring safety and durability in your projects.

Self-Fusing Adhesive for Secure Bonding: The tape features a self-fusing adhesive that creates a strong, secure bond. It adheres effectively to a variety of surfaces, ensuring long-lasting insulation and sealing.

Water-Resistant for Extra Durability: The water-resistant properties of this insulation tape make it ideal for use in challenging environments. Whether you're working in damp conditions or need extra protection, the tape holds up, providing reliable performance even in wet or humid settings.

Works in Extreme Temperatures: With a working temperature range of 0-8°C, this tape is designed to withstand cold conditions without losing its adhesive strength. It remains flexible and reliable, making it perfect for both indoor and outdoor use.

Multi-Purpose for Electrical & General Use: This versatile insulation tape is not only perfect for electrical work but also ideal for various general-purpose tasks. Use it for cable bundling, sealing, or repairs in both residential and commercial applications, offering reliable insulation and protection across a wide range of projects.
